Well this is a dupe heavy game
In general characters are considered complete at e3 (base + 3 dupes)
But most support unit function without dupes (like faint and helot)

Which R WoD is better. Whisper or aged?
Skey and aliemus?
Both keyflare
What's the effect again
Aged is 1000 keyflare at end of battle
Whisper is 1000 keyflare at battle start
Sorry
I meant epiphany
Not whisper
1000 keyflare at battle start and 2 arith
For general clear, aged is better
Whisper is if you need that boost against the boss
Another note is that, if you can clear the mob wave without using posse, then whisper is better
Is Myriam’s wheel essential? I am running GMurphy team with her, idk if try get her E2 first or the wheel
Wheel is not necessary nor should you feel inclined to pull for it, you can simply run Incalc just fine
So, question, I was wrong about which awakener threw me off. It was daffodil. And I actually enjoyed the play cycle of Doresain. Is this a bad thing XD
Wouldn't say it's bad thing
We don't recommend new players to pull daff and doresain because they are not the easiest to play, and also requires high investment
But if you like them then eh
Pull if you like lolz
ngl, daff is kinda annoying to play more then hard. Too much big brain wombo combo nonsense. Dorsian is just. Build up, kill something and burst HARD
while miryum is kinda between the pair. It feels like a midrange hunter/warlock if anyone here has played harthstone. Or possibly demonhunter
I played that and still unsure what you are trying to get across
Miryum is all about floating your hand turn to turn, slowly building up a powerful answer
You mean like keeping her cards in hand and don't play them(?
or play only exactly what you need as you build up
again, very midrange in terms of how it plays
Sort of... except she's not really building up to anything lol
I do like that you get some options with her as well
I meant that in terms of getting bonuses from having her cards in hand and cycling effects
still, alot easier to get used to then daff
If you enjoy it then it's cool
Kath is the most midrange feeling character in my opinion
No tricks just strike and defense for 5000 damage and then a massive hyperflare
the way you describe miryam sounds like control
can someone help me do password battle and another round on traphase?

true, midrange and control have alot of overlap though, so it's pretty easy for me to make that mistake now at days. It's been far too long since I last played any arena/pvp based tcg

or board wipes and the like
and the one they cant answer kills them
and my main playstyles were control and midrange, and I loved to play alot of plink, rush, and ramp

aka burn
you just described every kind of deck in existence

plink is a format of burn that normally revolves around lots of 1 damage sources

mtg has pure combo decks where you just hard mulligan for the combo and then go off on turn 2
no midrange there

like the days when dredge was viable in modern, or the original ravnica days

besides that I did some playing on arena a few years ago

but man, I remember shadows, cause I put a deck together for like 40$ and blew up some small tourny with it when I lived in az
rdw?
bw

like white black warriors from khans block?
nah, nearly purely made from shadows, with some older stuff splashed in, mostly ghosts
thats crazy that you won with that
yea
again, people really underestimated shadows commons

Ok nice, so not pollux or Clem I see you can choose them too
For daffo what's a good team?

pollux is a main dps who wants a lot of dupes

clem is also good, you can pick her if you want

daff's thing is generating huge amounts of poison and temporary counter with thousand mirage. you have to put her in a team that is able to abuse the poison and counter she makes

for example counter build uses nautila or 24 to convert all your temporary counter into a big damage nuke (effectively doubling daff damage for that turn)

poison build would have something like lily or gdoll to trigger the poison

you can also run both in the same team, for example, lily gdoll nautila daffodil is a reasonable team

hi, i started playing recently.. i am kinda lost here. where can i farm stuff to upgrade my awakeners? do i have to farm from the main story fights?
i am not a gacha player so this is new experience for me !
says rec lvl 7

Your two options for farming stuff to upgrade your awakeners are the events (daffodil currently has one) and the interlude stages both using stamina. 

The events are generally much more stamina efficient. Events are usually either targeted farming or a grab bag where you get a little of everything.

You can ignore the recommended level warnings, especially early on. Just upgrade your units when you can.
thank you !! :D
Sorry had to do something, but yea here is my current box
The last two pictures are the teams I use the most, Helot I switch with Aigis depending
If you haven't yet, you should definitely pick up Mouchette's Posse from Multiversal Link
I believe that you can still unlock it for free currency as her Event is still active
Chapter > Multiversal Link
It's a very powerful Posse for her

As while it doesn't directly raise your Damage Output via Strength or Crit Rate / Damage, it will allow you to draw 2 Strikes (and reduce their Cost by 1 if Mouchette is in the Team) which will trigger her Pursuit + benefits from Helot Exalt

what should i be spending my sediment on (other than the cores, since i assume those are always good to just buy out every month)
like should i be saving for stuff locked behind a higher keeper level? i think those prototype horizons and timeloop copys are basically just a free dupe of a character right? those worth getting now? or save for soemthing else like one of the wheels?
Nvm, it ended a few days ago
Yeah, highest priority should always be Timeless Loop & Proto Horizons as they are your main Source for raising the Enlightenment of your Limited WoDs & Awakeners respectively
It's very valuable, as it can be used on those whose Banners are not currently active too

alr, will work towards getting those
any specific one i should prioritize? or just try my best to get both
Both
So long as you regularly use your Pure Cores to pull on Standard Awakener / WoD Banners, you'll have enough to obtain them each month

It's also best to save the remaining Radix Sediments that you have after obtaining the Timeless Loop & Proto Horizon, so that you can ensure that you'll be able to purchase them again in the following month
And keep ample supply of them
When you deem it necessary to use them
I actually did unlock her posse from the event, so I got it 👍
whats the fast way to farm posse release to get the free 5 star ?

Use epiphany and aged blue wheels +gold wheel of unseen if you have it, you basically start matches with free posse and can spam it, moment of reunion to regen more key flare per awakener card also can help
You should definitely equip it then
It's very versatile for Mouchette
